credentials.name: Supabase - ASI360
credentials.notes: Service role key required for full database access. Get from Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API

credentials.name: SendGrid - ASI360
credentials.notes: Get API key from SendGrid Dashboard → Settings → API Keys. Requires 'Mail Send' permission.

credentials.name: Twilio - ASI360
credentials.notes: Get credentials from Twilio Console → Account → API Credentials

credentials.name: vTiger CRM
credentials.notes: Session token obtained via vTiger login API. Expires after 24 hours. See vTiger sync workflow for auto-refresh logic.

environmentVariables.description: Set these in your N8N environment (docker-compose.yml or .env file)

required.name: VTIGER_BASE_URL
required.description: Base URL for vTiger REST API

required.name: VTIGER_ACCESS_KEY
required.description: vTiger access key from My Preferences → Security

optional.name: N8N_WEBHOOK_URL
optional.description: Public URL for N8N webhooks (for vTiger integration)
optional.note: Required only if using vTiger → Supabase sync

optional.name: LEAD_ENRICHMENT_API_KEY
optional.description: Optional API key for lead enrichment service (Clearbit, FullContact, etc.)

n8n_cloud: 6. Set environment variables in Settings → Environment
n8n_self_hosted_docker: 1. Create .env file in same directory as docker-compose.yml
2. Add all environment variables from this template
4. Restart N8N: docker-compose down && docker-compose up -d
5. Import credentials via N8N UI (Settings → Credentials)
6. Or use N8N CLI: n8n import:credentials --input=credentials-template.json
n8n_self_hosted_npm: 2. Add all environment variables from this template
4. Restart N8N: pkill n8n && n8n start

troubleshooting: Verify URL format: https://xxxxx.supabase.co (no trailing slash)
Use service_role key, not anon key
Check Supabase project is not paused
Check API key has 'Mail Send' permission
Verify sender email is verified in SendGrid
Check SendGrid account is not suspended
Check auth token is correct (not API key)
For trial accounts: verify destination numbers
Check Twilio account has SMS enabled
Check access key is from correct user
Verify user has API access enabled

best_practices: Never commit this file with real credentials to git
Rotate all API keys every 90 days
Enable IP whitelist where possible (SendGrid, Twilio)
Use least-privilege access (e.g., read-only where possible)
credential_storage: N8N encrypts credentials using encryption key
Do not share N8N database file without encrypting first

credential_not_found.error: Error: Credential with id '1' could not be found
solution: Or update workflow JSON to reference correct credential IDs
Check credential ID in Settings → Credentials matches workflow
Add delay nodes between API calls
